task_completion.description: Create a new Location named 'Berlin Branch' with Currency override 'EUR'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Locations page or location details, look for 'Berlin Branch' with the currency explicitly set to 'EUR' and City set to 'Berlin'.

task_completion.description: Create a new Supplier named 'Berlin Tech Wholesale'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Suppliers page or supplier details, look for a supplier named 'Berlin Tech Wholesale' with City 'Berlin'.

task_completion.description: Update employee Klaus Weber's Title to 'Country Manager' and Location to 'Berlin Branch'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Users page or Klaus Weber's profile, verify the Title is 'Country Manager' and the Location is 'Berlin Branch'.

task_completion.description: Relocate laptop 'ASSET-MAC-088' to 'Berlin Branch' and check it out to Klaus Weber
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets page or asset details for 'ASSET-MAC-088', verify the Default Location is 'Berlin Branch' and the 'Checked Out To' field shows Klaus Weber.

task_completion.description: Create Asset Model 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Asset Models page, look for a model named 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw' under the Printers category and HP manufacturer.

task_completion.description: Create Asset 'ASSET-BER-PRN-01' with the correct model, status, location, supplier, and cost
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets page, look for asset tag 'ASSET-BER-PRN-01'. Verify its Model is 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw', Status is 'Ready to Deploy', Default Location is 'Berlin Branch', Supplier is 'Berlin Tech Wholesale', and Purchase Cost is '450'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web application loaded in a web browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated through the forms and saved the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of form filling, success flash messages (e.g., 'Asset created successfully'), or populated data tables in Snipe-IT, rather than just a text editor with the task description.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open, and the UI should look consistent with standard Snipe-IT rendering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following values must be verified in the Snipe-IT interface: Location Name: 'Berlin Branch', Location Currency: 'EUR', Supplier Name: 'Berlin Tech Wholesale', User Title for Klaus Weber: 'Country Manager', Laptop Asset Tag: 'ASSET-MAC-088', Printer Model Name: 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw', Printer Asset Tag: 'ASSET-BER-PRN-01', Printer Purchase Cost: '450'.
